__warnings.note: 'Mhoro, {{name}}!' stays Shona in both locales (greeting verbatim). 'What's on your mind today?' translated as 'Chii chiri mupfungwa dzako nhasi?'. Reviewer: tone-check.
Starts with 'Ndine urombo' (I am sorry, Shona) — kept verbatim. The English 'something went wrong' part flips. Mixed-language is intentional per the design (greeting/exclamation stays Shona).
Status labels include emoji — kept as-is in front, Shona behind.
'Conversation active — speak or tap ⏹ to stop' — symbol kept, surrounding text translated.

input.placeholder_convo_active: Hurukuro yakavhurwa — taura kana udzvanye ⏹ kumira

messages.welcome: Mhoro, {{name}}! Chii chiri mupfungwa dzako nhasi?
messages.auto_listen_greeting: Mhoro! Ndiri kuteerera. Taura paunenge wagadzirira.
